data.title: Why Is Portage Biotech Stock Skyrocketing Friday?
data.description: Portage Biotech unveils new preclinical data on PORT-7, showing strong antitumor effects in mesothelioma and advancing plans for clinical trials.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Forecasts High Gas Prices And LNG Demand Drive Kinder Morgan's Revenue
data.description: Goldman Sachs reaffirms its Buy rating on Kinder Morgan with a $31 price target, citing higher Q1 EBITDA expectations of $2.18 billion, above consensus. Analysts highlight LNG-driven gas demand growth and improved commodity pricing as key drivers, with the company positioned to benefit from smaller infrastructure projects in 2025.

data.title: 10 Information Technology Stocks Moving In Friday's Intraday Session
XRP Down 7%: What Is Going On?
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is down 7% on Friday, but whales continue to accumulate on the heels of Ripple expanding its core business.

data.title: SiriusXM Bearish Analyst Highlights Key Near Term Challenges
data.description: BofA analyst reiterated Underperform on Sirius XM with $21 price target. Sirius XM facing near-term challenges, focused on generating $1.5B free cash flow by 2027.
